scripts.dev: concurrently -n vite,electron -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace=frontend" "npm start --workspace=electron"
scripts.dev:lan: concurrently -n vite,electron -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace=frontend -- --host 0.0.0.0" "npm start --workspace=electron"
scripts.web: concurrently -n api,vite -c green,cyan "node ./cli/luna.mjs backend" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend"
scripts.web:lan: concurrently -n api,vite -c green,cyan "node ./cli/luna.mjs backend" "npm run dev --workspace=frontend -- --host 0.0.0.0"
scripts.dist: npm run assets:logo && npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build:win --workspace=electron
scripts.test:smoke: npm run luna -- check && node --check cli/luna.mjs && npm run test:tools
